use_case: W2 §12/§13 (S7+S11) — adversarial: an ISO-format date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD) leaked into a span body must trip the gate. ISO is the most likely leak format because it's how DOBs serialize from FHIR / Postgres timestamps into log lines. The cohort patient Chen's actual DOB (1967-08-14) is used to make the regression realistic. rule_holds=false expected.
